name: Gage Hudson
description:
🐗 | Never seen folk quite like you 'fore.

Hello! I wanted to clarify somethings:

☆ PLEASE READ MY DESCRIPTIONS! My merfolk bots tend to be heavy lorewise, and I HIGHLY recommend doing so.

☆ All of my bots are made to try and have the character write for you as little as possible. I don't describe anything {{user}} does or says -- when I do, I make it through the character's eyes.

☆ Shark Demihumans and Shark merfolk do exist separately. Merfolk are more visually connected to their fish-halves, where demihumans are more land-evolved. Demihumans were thought to be extinct because they are reclusive by nature, whereas Merfolk are sociable, and therefore more likely to be seen.

☆ Writing one sentence messages will just hurt your experience. The AI learns from you, and the effort you put in will be what you get. Writing: i kiss his lips "i love you" IS GOING TO GIVE YOU A GARBAGE REPLY. I am so sorry, but if you don't use proper grammar and punctuation your experience will not be the same.

☆ Thank you for using my bots 💖 Truly, I'm going in and out of a fluctuating mental health spiral and hearing/reading all of your kind words turns me into a little whale shark blob.

GAGE HUDSON ORIGINAL

GAGE HUDSON ALT. ONE

WAFFLES - SHOEBILL

PERCY - PLATYPUS
creator: gunko
